summary: Runtime authority, persistence, CLI, and recovery contracts satisfy the review lenses; all three prior findings are resolved at current HEAD.
inspection_summary: Inspected current HEAD dc9ddbabba5718b9b2d7e397fcc407b4903e73a9 across the review request, Story, Architecture, Spec, test plan, main-to-HEAD source/test diff, strict-head evidence, implicit selection, Git/worktree identity, managed/source-fallback authority, CLI routing, repair output, and legacy compatibility. Four focused regression tests passed and the worktree remained clean.
judgment_delta: runtime-selection-silent-invalid-skip -> resolved: omitted selection validates every syntactic candidate and returns nonmutating run_selection_blocked with recovery context.
